faqs.question: Can Techno India University, Tripura be considered a good University?
faqs.answer: Techno India University Tripura (TIUT) was established in the year 2023. It is recognised by UGC, AICTE, BCI and is a part of the Techno India Group. The University offers UG,PG and integrated programmes in streams such as Humanities and Social Sciences, Agriculture Sciences, Natural Sciences, Pharmaceutical Sciences etc. It is sa private University with 7 Schools and 30+ courses. It can be concluded that the University is evolving with every passing day.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at TIU?
faqs.answer:
For admission to TIU, candidates must fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria as per the official website. The admission enquiry form is available on the website. The step-wise admission process is given below: 
Step 1: The first step is to visit the official website of TIU Tripura and fill out an online admission enquiry form with all the basic details around the Name, Phone Number, Email ID and choose a desired course.
STep 2: Techno India University admissions are completely based on candidates' scores in the TIUT entrance exam. Aspirants are required to appear for the exam and qualify with a valid score. For MBA admissions, the scores of the GMAT/ CAT/ JEMAT/ MAT entrance exam are accepted.
Step 3: Candidates who qualify for the respective exam are required to visit the campus of TIUT Tripura in person to submit the required documents or upload the documents online on the given portal.
Step 4: After the document verification, the selected students have to make the final fee payment on the link provided by the university.

faqs.question: What is the application process for MBA at Techno India University?
faqs.answer:
Those who are interested in TIU Tripura MBA admissions, they must visit the official website of the university and fill an online student admission enquiry form. Find below the step-wise application process for TIU Tripura MBA admission 2023:
Step 1: Visit the official website of TIUT Tripura and click on the "Apply Now" tab.
Step 2: Fill the form with all the basic details such as Name, Phone Number, Email ID and choose a desired course. 
Step 3: The admission team of the university will contact to discuss about the programme.

faqs.question: How costly is TIUT Tripura?
faqs.answer:
TIUT Tripura is considered to be moderately priced. The cost of studying at the university may depend on individual preferences, accommodation, career goals and lifestyle. Students must note that the total fee includes registration fee, hostel fee, and mess fee among other components. The total tuition fee for various courses at Techno India University Tripura is given below:
Course Total Tuition Fee (INR)
MBA 2.6 Lacs
BTech 4 Lacs to 4.4 Lacs
LLB 1.8 Lacs
BSc 1.8 Lacs to 4 Lacs

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: As a newly opened institute, it is growing rapidly.

review_content.Placements: None of students has been placed as of now, as the university's first batch is yet to graduate. The university is newly opened, so no placements have been done yet. Our university is also yet to be accredited by ICAR and NAAC, with ICAR being the main accreditor for the Agricultural Department.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university was established in 2023, and I took admission in 2024 which makes me a student of the 2nd batch. As of now, some of the infrastructure of the campus is still under construction, but the process is quite rapid, so it is a good thing for us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Biotechnology Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is very good, and the facilities available here are also good.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students in our college get placements. The average package is 2 to 3.5 LPA. It is a decent placement according to our branch in the college. Most students pursue further studies in our field, in research, or for master's and Ph.D. programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classes are not as good as those in higher universities. But since our college is developing very quickly, I think they will improve them. Our college offers more than 50 courses, and facilities and library are pretty good, I think.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Healthcare and Hospital Management - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The only way I could do it .

review_content.Placements: This university was opened in 2023, so I still don't know about placements. But as I heard from the faculty, they said the placements will be good for students and the student body. But I don't see the issue with the system being better in general, but I do think...
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-maintained, and the hostel is also good, but our campus is still in the building phase by our house. So I don't know, said that while there are some differences among his teammates in terms of that he...

overview_faqs.question: How is the safety and security of the students living in the campus of Techno India University Tripura?
overview_faqs.answer: Techno India University Tripura has a safe and secure campus with strict anti-ragging policies. The University has an anti-ragging sqaud to address matters at concern, for better functioning and patrolling. The campus is well- equipped with security personnel and staff to maintain the decorum among the students, in-campus and around. Failure to maintain the decorum of the campus may result to unwavering repercussions for the students.

admission_overview.title: Techno India University Tripura Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Techno India University (TUIT) Tripura admissions 2025 are currently open for all courses. TIU Tripura provides admission to UG & PG courses such as BBA, BCA, MBA, BTech, etc. Further, TIUT Tripura admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university admits students based on their past academic merit of the last qualifying exam. Except for MBA, the university accepts scores of GMAT/ CAT/ JEMAT/ MAT entrance exams to admit students. Check out the following table for the latest highlights related to Techno India University course admissions:

eligibility_selection.title: Techno India University Tripura Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Techno India University admissions 2025 are merit-based for most of its UG and PG courses. Check below the Manipal eligibility and selection criteria for various UG and PG courses related to TIUT Tripura course admissions:

courses_table.eligibility: Graduation in the relevant stream with a minimum of 55% aggregate

faqs.answer: To be eligible for admission to Techno India University Tripura, students must meet the basic educational requirements. Find them below:Course NameEligibilityMBAGraduation with a minimum 60% aggregateBBAClass 12 with a minimum 55% aggregateBTechClass 12 with a minimum 55% aggregateBScClass 12 with a minimum 55% aggregateMScGraduation in the relevant stream with a minimum of 55% aggregateBAClass 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Techno India University Tripura?

faqs.answer: Yes, passing Class 12 is mandatory in order to secure admission to Techno India University. Students seeking for admission to UG or PG courses at the college must qualify for Class 12 with minimum 50-55% aggregate in Class 12.
faqs.question: Is Class 12th mandatory for admission to Techno India University?

admission_process.title: Techno India University Tripura Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Techno India University admissions 2025 are merit-based for most of its UG and PG courses. Check below the Manipal eligibility and selection criteria for various UG and PG courses related to TIUT Tripura course admissions:

The admission process for Techno India University is a four-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds and document submission. A step-by-step Techno India University admission process is as follows:
Step 1: TIU Tripura Admission Enquiry Form

The first step is to visit the official website of TIU Tripura and fill out an online admission enquiry form with all the basic details around the Name, Phone Number, Email ID and choose a desired course.
Step 2: Appear for the Selection Rounds

Techno India University admissions are completely based on candidates' past academic merit. Aspirants are required to appear for the exam and qualify with a valid score. For MBA admissions, the scores of the GMAT/ CAT/ JEMAT/ MAT entrance exam are accepted.
Step 3: Submit Documents Offline
Candidates who qualify for the respective exam are required to visit the campus of TIUT Tripura in person to submit the required documents or upload the documents online on the given portal.
Step 4: Fee Payment
After the document verification, the selected students have to make the final fee payment on the link provided by the university.

reviews_list.review_title: It is the best government college for the civil department.

review_content.Placements: It was the first batch to pass out from my college, so there are no placements in the college, but there are decent placement offers for students in the civil branch in other colleges of Bihar engineering. The highest and the lowest salary packages are not offered till now in the college as its first batch will pass in 2023. In other colleges, you can expect a salary package that ranges from 5-6 LPA in the civil branch. Larsen & Toubro is the top recruiting company in other colleges of the civil department. Almost 90-95% of students got an internship. I also got an internship in the road construction department. It provided many internships offers from other companies based in Mathura, Delhi, and Ghaziabad. I am currently not aware of the top roles offered in our college.

highlights.summary: A renowned institution of higher learning, Vidya Knowledge Park has its roots in Meerut, Uttar Pradesh since 2007. A leading institute in the city known for its course of a PG Degree in Full Time mode. Vidya Knowledge Park is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM. Institute gives opportunity to gain professional level expertize through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Business & Management Studies. Reputed approving body like AICTE has recognized and approved course offerred by Vidya Knowledge Park. Course offered by Vidya Knowledge Park are available for a total of 120 aspiring candidates at affordable fees. Institute has good facilities all around the campus like Cafeteria, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Boys Hostel, Girls Hostel, Labs, Library, Shuttle Service, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Vidya Knowledge Park programmes is around INR 25,000 to 5,96,000.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Vidya Knowledge Park as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Vidya Knowledge Park is a renowned institution offering MBA/PGDM. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Business & Management Studies. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Vidya Knowledge Park boasts an impressive review rating of 4.27 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.33 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 4.33 for Faculty, and 4.33 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Vidya Knowledge Park?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Vidya Knowledge Park is approximately INR 119400.

review_summary.college_name: Vidya Knowledge Park Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and management.

content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in various companies by the college. The average package is 6 lakhs per annum. Ninety percent of students secured internships with different companies from the college. Top companies include Muscle Teach, Mankind, Cipla, etc. My college is excellent, and the faculty is outstanding.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-maintained, and the classrooms are also kept in good condition. A canteen is available, along with medical facilities. The library is well-maintained, and there are sports competitions, including cricket, kho, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: There is a very good environment in our college.

content.Placements: Best placements in our college. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest package is 7 LPA. 60% of students get placements in Cipla company. There are many companies that are connected to our college. There are so many companies that are liked by our college. Many students got good placements every year. The lowest salary was 3.7 LPA last year for a company. 60% of students get placements every year.
content.Infrastructure: There are well-clean and managed labs in every department. There is Wi-Fi in every department. There are all Wi-Fi departments.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Aviation & Travel - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Very best college and good placement.

content.Placements: I think atleast 98% of students get placements and offer letters from this college. The highest package goes to 5 LPA, and the lowest goes to 2.5 LPA. Top companies like Just Dial, Wipro, and many other companies come there.
content.Infrastructure: Online projectors and board are available. AC rooms are there. Hostels are just neat and clean. Students are very happy and many more things. I want to tell you about my college where the words are least for memories.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Well satisfied because of faculty. Really good hostel with AC rooms.

content.Placements: If we talk about placements, 80 percent of students get placed every year, excluding the COVID time. The highest package is approximately 9–10 LPA, the lowest is around 3–4 LPA, and the average package from VKP is approximately 6–7 LPA. Top recruiting companies at Vidya Knowledge Park include Infosys, TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), HCL Technologies, and others. Around 90 percent of students get internships in the middle of the 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities like free 24/7 Wi-Fi, digital boards in classrooms, smart classes, and AC classrooms. The college also available hostels for students, which have good infrastructure and good facilities like well and good rooms with air conditioning, water coolers, and washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: At least 70-80% of students are placed in my batch. The highest package given by the college is 7 LPA to 8 LPA, and the average price is 3-4 LPA. The companies come from everywhere, from the new startup to big MNCs like TCS, MICROSOFT, GOOGLE, etc.; they are all type of financial, technical, data analytics and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. I am obsessed with my college infrastructure. The conditions are so good, the teachers are very good, and the ACs are provided in every class. The smart boards are also in every classroom, which helps for a great learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and management.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-maintained, and the classrooms are also kept in good condition. A canteen is available, along with medical facilities. The library is well-maintained, and there are sports competitions, including cricket, kho, etc.

reviews.review_heading: There is a very good environment in our college.
reviews.review_text: There are well-clean and managed labs in every department. There is Wi-Fi in every department. There are all Wi-Fi departments.

reviews.review_heading: Very best college and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Online projectors and board are available. AC rooms are there. Hostels are just neat and clean. Students are very happy and many more things. I want to tell you about my college where the words are least for memories.

reviews.review_heading: Well satisfied because of faculty. Really good hostel with AC rooms.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like free 24/7 Wi-Fi, digital boards in classrooms, smart classes, and AC classrooms. The college also available hostels for students, which have good infrastructure and good facilities like well and good rooms with air conditioning, water coolers, and washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. I am obsessed with my college infrastructure. The conditions are so good, the teachers are very good, and the ACs are provided in every class. The smart boards are also in every classroom, which helps for a great learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Hostels were better. Internet facility was available 24X7. Laboratory was very good. Our campus was eco-friendly.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is huge with much greenery and is fully Wi-Fi enabled. Canteen and mess are available. The quality of facilities provided is good. Food served is tasty. Medical facilities and all the sports are available. It has a large stadium and gym facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The building is this college is beautiful. The classrooms are clean and beautiful. Laboratories are clean and fully air-conditioning. I feel productive there and satisfied with the infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the vibe, but it has good placements in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. We have a huge campus, but we can't get full exposure to it. Although we have a sports complex, we lack a system. Because of this, we can't get access to sports activities and co-curricular activities. We have a library and a computer lab on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vidya Knowledge Park, Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi isn't available for students and labs are available at good management. The classrooms are good and the library has a good collection of books. There is a hostel facility in our college with good management and three canteens along with a sports complex are available. There is good medical facility as well.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty are bad, and I suggest choosing a college that provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Vidya Knowledge Park is one of the most popular colleges in Meerut because of its infrastructure. They have the best infrastructure in Meerut. The hostels are available for both boys and girls, with proper facilities. There are 3 different canteens for different departments.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good facilities and canteen food.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure like good Wi-Fi connection, maintained clean laboratories with the proper working of all the computers, every classroom has a smart class with, and clean discipline environment, maximum type of book students need during the course available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college in Meerut city.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good for the fee they ask. The library is pretty decent and has books on different subjects in a huge number. Our college provides students parking for two-wheelers only, and no student car is allowed inside the campus. Still, there is plenty of space outside where you can park your four-wheeler easily.

reviews.review_heading: Cheap and best is vidya.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite impressive and greenery all around the college. We have different labs and activity places. I was a day scholar, can't review hostel much but food was amazing in hostel and we have 4 canteens altogether in college and one canteen is separately run by the famous ex contestant of MasterChef India MS nisha.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best faculty members and a good placement department.
reviews.review_text: Vidya Knowledge Park has a beautiful new building, and everything which students possibly need is available here. Our college has an amazing library, computer rooms, moot courts, practical rooms, refreshment areas, lecture theatre, NSS room, first-aid rooms, etc. Our college also has a clean canteen and a temple. A swimming pool is also available here.

individual_reviews.title: Yes our teachers are helpful to us and qualified and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is good.

individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and classrooms.

content.Placements: No one placed from our batch, in 2025. They do not offer any companies to students. They send links to companies in the official group about internships or jobs. The college is not for knowledgeable students who have skills. If students want only a degree they can join here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay. College provides Wi-Fi and a separate library and classrooms are good with projectors.
content.Faculty: Faculty members of CSE branch are much better. They have good knowledge, they support us, they are friendly with students and also strictly in class. They teach according to the syllabus and sometimes they complete only 70%-80% of the syllabus. Semester exams and internals are conducted very strictly in our college with CCTV cameras. They teach you better and if you have any doubts they clarify that. No negative opinion on faculty members of the CSE branch.

review_content.Placements: After the 6th semester, students are eligible for placement, and the highest package is 45 LPA by 1 student in Amazon company. Many more companies visit this college like Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, IBM, and many other companies which you will get the whole details in the college site with the packages. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and their rooms are good. Depends on which hostel you book in all hostel the attached bathrooms there but in the 1 hostel the common bathroom is there but the rooms and facilities are good with 24*7 water, electricity and at the particular time a hot water supply is available. The food is average because the taste is sometimes good and sometimes not good but they provide chicken and egg every day except Saturday because full of veg and during lunch they provide egg different recipe of eggs and for chicken also.

faqs.question: What specialisation does Vel Tech offer in their courses?

answer.text: Vel Tech has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: How can I get into Vel Tech for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college life will make your future.

content.Placements: I am currently pursuing my second semester in college. We have several kind of opportunities for placement with multinational companies and we will be trained for the palace since our 3rd semester. We have internships from foreign universities and we will be getting those opportunities in our third year. The top role in college is getting placed in Amazon.
content.Infrastructure: We have great facilities with good labs and great equipment. Our labs are well-equipped and we will have all kinds of equipment for practical teaching, practice and understanding. All our classes have projectors, and we have great infrastructure here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Vel Tech college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in this college is 90 percent. The highest package offered last year is 25 LPA. The lowest package offered in this college is 3 LPA. Probably, many students got internships, and many students went abroad.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is good in the hostel. The food is also nice, and many best facilities are available. The infrastructure is good but not so nice. Sports have high value, and many times they went for tournaments to other colleges and got 1st prize.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This University has a good infrastructure and good faculty members.

content.Placements: After the 6th semester, students are eligible for placement, and the highest package is 45 LPA by 1 student in Amazon company. Many more companies visit this college like Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, IBM, and many other companies which you will get the whole details in the college site with the packages. The average package is 4.5 LPA and till now the highest package is 45 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel and their rooms are good. Depends on which hostel you book in all hostel the attached bathrooms there but in the 1 hostel the common bathroom is there but the rooms and facilities are good with 24*7 water, electricity and at the particular time a hot water supply is available. The food is average because the taste is sometimes good and sometimes not good but they provide chicken and egg every day except Saturday because full of veg and during lunch they provide egg different recipe of eggs and for chicken also.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Vel tech college offers a good life with lots of memories .

content.Placements: A beautiful college atmosphere with a nice environment. In terms of placements, the college brought in many MNCs like Accenture, Cognizant, and TCS, and many students got placed. The highest package is 17 LPA at my college, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Everyone should study hard to secure placements.
content.Infrastructure: Courses are provided based on the group selected, and every student studies the same subjects during the first year. The faculty are very friendly. Regarding the hostel, it is one of the best in Chennai, and everyone will like it very much.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: For a student, who choose to take an average college, it would be the best.

content.Placements: Approximately 50% of the students from our batch of 2023 passed out. For CSE, the highest package is 44 LPA, the average is 4-5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The top six recruiting companies at our college are TCS, Cognizant, Capgemini, Accenture, Wipro, and Infosys. Nearly 70% of our course students got internships. Most of them got internships from Cognizant. Software developers are the top role that you get at our university.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in classrooms but speed is limited. Classrooms are hygienic and clean. Smart boards are available to teach students. The labs are well-equipped and well-maintained by the management. The library is calm and a vast number of books are available from our library .

faqs.question: How can I get into Vel Tech for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Vel Tech has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domic

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Vel Tech for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: Vel Tech courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Vel Tech goes up to 300.

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology:

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology is a private institute, established in 2001 in Medak, Telangana. Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 13 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 5 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and After 10th Diploma in Full Time mode. Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 44,700 to 2,48,000. Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology has an annual seat intake of 894 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology is around INR 44700 - INR 248000.

Major specialisation at Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology are Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My suggestion to students is please don't join this college.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage of students is less, and the package of placements is 1 LPA to 5 LPA for Computer Science and Engineering. The placement percentage is low, for example, out of 100 students, only 2 students get placements. Internships like NPTEL are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good with a well-maintained atmosphere and labs, but there are not enough systems in the labs. Library facilities are not that good because all books are not available in the library. When it comes to sports, they are held weekly three times for every class.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college infrastructure is good, but the teaching is not good, and no placements.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students have been placed. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 1 LPA. There are no internships, but one NPTEL internship is provided by the college. Recruiting companies are TCS, MNCs, etc. Top roles are offered in a course. I don't know, I haven't seen them in our college up to now, as I joined recently.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are bad, and the quality of food is poor. Medical facilities are not available. The labs and workshops are good. The library looks good, but there are no current books in it. In the mess, food is available, but the quality of the food is not proper.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College life and activities.

review_content.Placements: My class strength is 20 members. 98% is the success ratio in my batch. In the recruiting process, they ask about project details. Software roles are offered. The highest package of my batch is 4,60,000 per annum. Some students got placed in CSSI, TCS, and Rakuten.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of classes is very good. All facilities are available such as a canteen, Wi-Fi, labs, etc. Each department has a different time to use or allocate lab students. For respective subjects, there are different lab in charge. The canteen has a high quality of food. It is clean and students are chilled in that area only.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It's not much worth for these days to study in these college.

review_content.Placements: 5 to 10 percent of students were placed in CSE. The highest package was 12 LPA in 2019, and the least package was 3.6 LPA. Rakuten, TCS, HCL, and MuSigma were the companies that recruited. Fewer members got internships. The roles offered by the companies are MERN stack developer and software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer working is not much efficient, properly facilities was average in Wi-Fi, maintenance and hostel. The canteen food is not good and the management was not up to the mark in terms of involvement in particular things. Like bringing placements it was good few years ago.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Know about Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2024 batch, and mostly students from the CSE course have been placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest package is 7 LPA. In our course, about 10% of the members have been selected, which means 6 to 7 members at HCL, the top recruiter for our course. Unfortunately, nobody got any internships offered by companies through our college, and the top roles offered from our course are only in software engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good; we have libraries and access to all labs, including a huge library. However, no Wi-Fi is provided. There is only one faculty member in the hostel, but the hostel rooms are good, with 3 to 4 members per room, which is sufficient. The canteen food is decent; the lunch quality varies from good to bad. We have all types of sports available, but most people play cricket and volleyball. There are no medical facilities on campus, so we have to go to a hospital if needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: There are 45% students got placed in my course. The highest package is 30 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Rakuten and Mu Sigma and some other companies. 45% students are got internships from my course in HCL and some companies etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our course are good Wi-Fi and labs and good lab trainers neat classes and with a big library. The quality of the food is average and the hostel facilities are better, and they keep sports for some events and games with good equipment.

cut_off.college_name: Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 38586 and 117046 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the sam

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 38586, 61666 and 72959, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 22451. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 26407, and the 2023 cutoff was 29473 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been increasing in the last 3 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My suggestion to students is please don't join this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good with a well-maintained atmosphere and labs, but there are not enough systems in the labs. Library facilities are not that good because all books are not available in the library. When it comes to sports, they are held weekly three times for every class.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good, but the teaching is not good, and no placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are bad, and the quality of food is poor. Medical facilities are not available. The labs and workshops are good. The library looks good, but there are no current books in it. In the mess, food is available, but the quality of the food is not proper.

reviews.review_heading: College life and activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of classes is very good. All facilities are available such as a canteen, Wi-Fi, labs, etc. Each department has a different time to use or allocate lab students. For respective subjects, there are different lab in charge. The canteen has a high quality of food. It is clean and students are chilled in that area only.

reviews.review_heading: It's not much worth for these days to study in these college.
reviews.review_text: Computer working is not much efficient, properly facilities was average in Wi-Fi, maintenance and hostel. The canteen food is not good and the management was not up to the mark in terms of involvement in particular things. Like bringing placements it was good few years ago.

reviews.review_heading: Know about Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good; we have libraries and access to all labs, including a huge library. However, no Wi-Fi is provided. There is only one faculty member in the hostel, but the hostel rooms are good, with 3 to 4 members per room, which is sufficient. The canteen food is decent; the lunch quality varies from good to bad. We have all types of sports available, but most people play cricket and volleyball. There are no medical facilities on campus, so we have to go to a hospital...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our course are good Wi-Fi and labs and good lab trainers neat classes and with a big library. The quality of the food is average and the hostel facilities are better, and they keep sports for some events and games with good equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Totally Worth to study in this college but for new batches fee has been hiked.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are provided on campus, with well-equipped lab equipment available. The quality of the food is average. Sports and games are conducted on every occasion and every year, they organize a fest in the college. Additionally, an annual day is held every three years.

reviews.review_heading: IIET college Siddipet review .
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is average at our college and facilities are average, which is low compared to other colleges. 
Wi-Fi is not available in our college but the computer facility is there and the classrooms are neat and well maintained. 
The hostel is clean and food is average.
Sports like cricket are encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good institute.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very beautiful and extraordinary the college is made of beautiful paintings, colors and types of design. The students kept the web option after seeing the infrastructure of this college. The college is located in the middle of greenery.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. We have campus hostel and it is highly secured with the security guards and CCTV. In hostel, we have hygienic food and neat and clean rooms. We have good environment in college surroundings. We have pleasant classrooms and a library to study. We have practical labs and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Completely dissatisfied with the college management and placements provided by them.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi access is only available at the software labs and no Wi-Fi access at the library and classes also. Not well stocked library limited books are available. Canteen is food is not so good and hygienic students prefer outside food compare to the college canteen food. No medical facilities are available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Not good at placement procedure.
reviews.review_text: Quality of the facilities in the college hostel are not so much good. And food provided at the meets and canteen is not much good but can eat ones a week. Mostly cricket played in indur institute of engineering college. Library is available but not many books available .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college because of its fests, environment, teaching, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a large ground, a mess, and a canteen. They provide food at an affordable price. Our college has large labs. We can play sports and games on the ground. We have free Wi-Fi in our college. All classrooms are large and have fresh air.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the teaching quality, good placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are available. Projectors are available in classrooms. The facilities available at the hostel are very good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. The food is delicious. Medical facilities are available for hostel students. There is a huge ground to play sports and games like cricket, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: You can enjoy campus life here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was very good. There were four members in a room. Wi-Fi was available in the hostel. The hostel was under CCTV surveillance 24X7. Washrooms were clean. There were separate bathrooms and restrooms. Facilities and the infrastructure were very good. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. There were separate blocks for B.Tech and diploma.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Indur Institute of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: A well knoen companies visited our college some of them are AMAZON, BIG-C, KARVY-III And many more other companies offered placements to our college.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Saraswati Group of Colleges are BSc, BPharm, BEd, and MBA at UG and PG levels in a variety of Paramedical Science, Engineering, Computing, Business Administration, Hospitality & Tourism, Ayurveda, Pharmacy, Nursing, Forensic Science, and Physiotherapy disciplines. The Department of Business Administration of the institute is dedicated to imparting value- and need-based, quality management education to develop talented leaders.
The department offers an MBA programme with specialisations in HR, Finance, Marketing, International Business, IT, and Retail. The two-year PG programme has a semester pattern and a papers per semester, including an internship in the last semester. There are 210 seats available in the MBA programme. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at the Saraswati Group of Colleges in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Saraswati Group of Colleges provides 100% placement assistance, personalised mentorship, and has established connections with many corporate partners. Students are engaged in paid internships and live projects starting from their second year, enhancing their practical skills and employability. According to the official website, the highest salary package stood at INR 32 LPA. Top companies visit Saraswati Group of Colleges placements such as Infosys, HDFC Bank, Wipro, Reliance Industries, IBM, Cognizant, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Really best college in Mohali.

review_content.Placements: 3 to 5 percent of students were placed in various hospitals. The highest package started from Rs 70,000 per month and the average package was about Rs 45,000 per month and Rs 25,000 per month without hostel. Recruiting companies were mainly in the private hospital. We got our internship from the hospital GMC and rest of the private clinics. The roles offered in our course were the X ray technician computed tomography MRI and various others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for my course was quite good. Classrooms were spacious, equipped with projectors, and had clean seating. Our labs were well-maintained with proper computers, lab assistants, and updated software. Library had a decent collection of books and also provided access to online journals. Hostel facilities were average. Rooms were shared (usually 2 or 3 students), and the basic amenities were provided like a bed, table, chair, and cupboard. Wi-Fi was available but sometimes slow. The mess food was okay, though not great. It was edible but repetitive. Bathrooms were cleaned regularly, but water issues sometimes occurred.

paragraphs: Saraswati Group of Colleges admissionis entrance and entrance-based. It offersUG, PG and after 10courses in numerous specialisations.Saraswati Group of Collegesis affiliated withBaba Farid University of Health Sciences. Some of the courses provided by it include B.Sc. (Post Basic), UG Diploma and M.Sc. courses. Admission is based on scores obtained in national-level entrance exams. BSc Post Basic, UG Diploma, and MSc, etc., are some of the popular courses offered atSaraswati Group of Colleges. The college also conducts the SGC NEST exam for scholarships. Read the following article to learn all about the admission process, courses, and admission criteria of the college.

Saraswati Group of Colleges course admissionis subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Saraswati Group of Colleges offers these courses in streams such as Neuroscience & Mental Health Nursing, Paediatric Nursing, General Nursing & Midwifery, General Medicine and Ayurved, and more. Candidates can either appear for the Common Entrance Test conducted by the institute or provide a valid score obtained in any of the other accepted tests. Students can check out the table below to learn about the general eligibility and selection criteria forSaraswati Group of Colleges courses:

The admission procedure for Saraswati Group of Colleges includes multiple steps, such as application, selection, and seat confirmation. Eligible students can then proceed accordingly with the rest of the steps. Students need to register themselves and go through the selection rounds to get a seat at the institute. Find below the steps to complete the Saraswati Group of Colleges admission process:
Step 1: Appear for the Accepted Entrance Exam

Since admissions are offered on an entrance basis, students must provide a valid score card of the accepted tests. For that, candidates need to appear for the accepted test mentioned above in the table.
Step 2: Apply Online

Students can visit the official website of the institute and start the application procedure by registering themselves and providing the specified information, such as personal details, educational qualifications, contact information, etc.
Step 3: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates on an entrance basis. The final selection is made based on the entrance exam score, followed by an institute-level interview. The interview is a rigorous process conducted to asses candidate's aptitude, leadership skills, etc. Detailed admission criteria can be obtained by visiting the official website of the institute.
Step 4: Seat Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay theSaraswati Group of Colleges feesto secure their spots at the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in Saraswati Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: To get a seat in Saraswati Group of Colleges, candidates need to meet the course-specific admission criteria. Those who qualify for the programme of choice can then fill out the application form given on the website or connect with the admission desk to apply offline. Applicants are then selected based on the pre-decided admission criteria. For certain courses, such as BAMS, admissions are made on the basis of entrance exam scores or academic merit as per the course requirements. For final selection, students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spots.

faqs.question: Are admissions open for Saraswati Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Yes,  Saraswati Group of Colleges admissions are open for various courses. Students seeking to join the college need to visit the official website of the institute to apply for the desired programme. Interested candidates need to firstly check the admission criteria of the desired programme. The admission process is mainly conducted online.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Admission in Diploma Mechanical Engineering provided course information and best college.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students were placed. The lowest package was 2.2 LPA, the highest was 6 LPA, and the average was about 3.8 LPA. Kirloskar, Mahindra, Tata Motors, and L&T were among the recruiters. Workshops and manufacturing facilities offer internships. Negative, limited chances for R&D.
content.Infrastructure: The CNC, welding, and lathe machines in the workshops are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, and technical books are available in the library. The hostel is good, and there are sports facilities. Mess food is mediocre and occasionally monotonous. Medical care is not sophisticated, it is basic.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Friendly teaching and quality.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tata Motors and Bosch. The top roles offered are mechanical engineer and manufacturing engineer. 65% of students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good, with nice bedrooms and attached bathrooms. The infrastructure in our college is up to date. The Wi-Fi facility is available only for college faculty members and not for students. The classrooms are neat. The library provides all the books. The labs are well-equipped. The medical facilities are good.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shree Dhanvantary College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Admission in Diploma Mechanical Engineering provided course information and best college.
reviews.review_text: The CNC, welding, and lathe machines in the workshops are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, and technical books are available in the library. The hostel is good, and there are sports facilities. Mess food is mediocre and occasionally monotonous. Medical care is not sophisticated, it is basic.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly teaching and quality.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good, with nice bedrooms and attached bathrooms. The infrastructure in our college is up to date. The Wi-Fi facility is available only for college faculty members and not for students. The classrooms are neat. The library provides all the books. The labs are well-equipped. The medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the mechanical student.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in this course are superb. Wi-Fi and classroom as well as labs are available for students in college. The quality of food made in this college is so tasty and healthy. Medical facilities are available in college. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Titles of review is Admit Yadav.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my department were very good. Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are available in my course. The quality and facilities in my hostel and canteen were very good. Medical facilities are available in my college. Sports and gaming facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shree Dhanvantary College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Yes, all the facilities are provided in our college. My course deployment is good and good infrastructure is provided in the college. Food quality made in the canteen for the students is also good. Medicine is not present in my college. But sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good. The department has well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a decent library. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel rooms are clean and comfortable, with decent mess food. Canteen options are limited but affordable. Medical facilities are basic but sufficient. Sports facilities are good, with regular tournaments organized.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing Shree Dhanvanti College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of this course are good. Wi-Fi and labs are provided to the students of this course. Library is not available. The food quality in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are also present. Sports and games are played in the course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shree Dhanvantary College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course are so good. Wi-Fi and libraries all need things to be present. The quality of the hostel food in my course is good and tasty. Medical facilities are present. Sports and games are available in my course.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, not so good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is well maintained and clean, but sometimes the washrooms/toilets are unclean and unhygienic. The food in the canteen is okay, neither good nor bad. There is a railway station nearby, so transport is not a big problem for students.

reviews.review_heading: More you do more you get.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is good and quality facilities are provided, such as classrooms, libraries, playgrounds, labs, canteens, hostels, transport, Wi-Fi, and electricity. The food available in college canteens, hostels, and mess is average. Sports and games are conducted for my department.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shree Dhanvantary College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The classrooms are very big and very neat. Good benches. The labs are air-conditioned and well-equipped. The library is good. The Wi-Fi connection is available. The hostel provides all facilities like mineral water and hot water, good mess, and gym.

reviews.review_heading: Really good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is okay to stay in, and the food is okay. Food is not hygienic and has a limited variety of food items. The canteen is available in the college and medical facilities are also available at the hostel and college. Sports and games are conducted after college hours.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent; all kinds of facilities are available in the college, like food, canteens, stationary and xerox shops. Internet cafes, huge ground and transportation facilities like buses are there. The college is near a bus and auto stop. Huge college area. Events and fests are happening.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is superb because this one of the best thing in the campus. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are sufficient and it has enough equipment to practice. Daily labs are happened along with theory classes. The attendance is mandatory for every semester. Parties are happened at sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is quite enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have all types of laboratories which are related to this course like furnace, metallurgy, etc. Wi-Fi is available at the college. Libraries are there to lend books, and some time is given to play. Sports are conducted at some events.

faqs.answer: A:    SSM College of Engineering is a good institution for M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at SSM College of Engineering are Computer Science, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Textile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Petroleum Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of poor faculty and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are average. I have never seen an MNC visiting our campus. However, they provide 100% placement, and it is true. But, the companies are poor. They provide an average salary of Rs. 8,000 per month. The highest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. But, the main thing is that the jobs offered are not related to our field, i.e., computer science. Mostly, insurance companies and finance companies recruit students from our campus and offered roles in marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but the usage is limited to 20 Mb per day per device. The first-year building is very good, but the department buildings are too bad. Washrooms are more than 15 years old and not good. There is no vehicle available during medical emergencies. If any incident takes place, then the vehicle of any of the staff members is used. Books available in the library are too old. There are no books for regulation since 2013. Sports and games are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: I am slightly disappointed with the way they are managing the business school students.

review_content.Placements: I could say that the placement cell is below par. But, most of the students were placed in small-scale firms and companies. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 7,500 per month and the highest salary was Rs. 17,000 per month. Companies like Goodwill Commodities, Cafeteria, Indoshell, Sri Kannapiran Mills, LGP, Aqua Sub, and Citi Bank visited our college for recruitment. Most of the roles offered to the students were related to public relations officer, sales and marketing executive, and front office executives. There's no such thing like stipend or internship from our college. Our placement cell is not much efficient.

The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. While core subjects and fundamental concepts might be similar, the structure, electives offered, and laboratory and project work are different.You can check the detailed syllabus for the course on the respective college websites that you're targeting to get a clearer picture.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Teaching quality is not good. They provide placements for the students.

content.Placements: We did get many opportunities because it was pandemic. While we are passing now, they are providing some compensation for placement. They're also providing some placement training for students. The students of the entire college do not get placements from single companies.
content.Infrastructure: We had a playground in our hostel, and we also tried hostel facilities. Boys hostels are not very good. There is no gym or medical service in the hostel. The campus has a good library, which has all the books available for semester exams. Mess food and snacks are not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for students.

content.Placements: Placements were very good. Almost 100% of students got placed in this course. Top recruiting companies visited our college for recruitment. The salary package was decent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was excellent. Classrooms were well-maintained. Hostel was decent. The food served in the mess was great.
content.Faculty: Professors were educated. All teachers completed their degrees. The teaching quality was good. Teachers were very helpful and knowledgeable.

reviews.review_text: We had a playground in our hostel, and we also tried hostel facilities. Boys hostels are not very good. There is no gym or medical service in the hostel. The campus has a good library, which has all the books available for semester exams. Mess food and snacks are not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent. Classrooms were well-maintained. Hostel was decent. The food served in the mess was great.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of poor faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but the usage is limited to 20 Mb per day per device. The first-year building is very good, but the department buildings are too bad. Washrooms are more than 15 years old and not good. There is no vehicle available during medical emergencies. If any incident takes place, then the vehicle of any of the staff members is used. Books available in the library are too old. There are no books for regulation since 2013. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: I am slightly disappointed with the way they are managing the business school students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, as far as the basic needs are concerned. Wi-Fi facility is provided only for hostellers. Labs are good. Classrooms are spacious enough and tidy. The library is excellent. Medical facilities are below par. The college doesn't give much importance to sports and games. Quality of food is good. Hostel rooms are not much spacious, and you have to share your 12*16 rooms with 4 people. The sports grounds are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Not very satisfied with the teaching medium first and foremost. Even though infrastructure is well.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are good separate blocks for the separate departments in the college. The college canteen is bad and bad Wi-Fi. The labs depend on the department that you are in. The medical facilities are bad. The sports facilities are great even for the girls. The library is very well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion about the college is that it is a good college with good and experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure and good clean campus. For sports, various grounds and courts are available. In the main ground, the college has planted beautiful almond trees, which enhance the charm of the campus more. The college has various labs equipped with modern instruments machines and equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it seems okay for local people to take their course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure, we can consider as okay. Wi-Fi is for namesake they provided. The classrooms and labs need much quality. We enjoyed a lot in the hostel; it is of olden style. The food they provided is okay. Deposit amount, they won't give at any cost. For sports, they mainly concentrate on kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: If you are bound by all means necessary then decide to go ahead, otherwise it is a waste of time.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is at par. I mean, it is not comfortable nor does it is a discomfort to you. It lies at average. Talking about the laboratories, the computers are still with Windows-8, and they think, they are up to date. The labs also need serious upgrades. All the campus around the world has at least a free Wi-Fi. This college does not have that, what a shame.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements offered in the last year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The classroom was very good, and the library facilities are nice. A lot of books are available to read in the library. A playground is available for playing sports. In college, the Wi-Fi speed is slow. The college provides the placement training. A lot of events are conducted in my college. My college is accredited by Anna university.

reviews.review_heading: Really discouraging faculty, especially from computer science department.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure, it is not as good as you think it is. It looks comfortable but isn't. All the colleges have free Wi-Fi facility for all the students, while this college lacks only in this. Medical facilities are rare to see. Regarding sports, you will see everyone on the campus playing some sport. Talking about the quality of labs, they seriously need to upgrade. Events are held on a regular basis.

This is one of the best colleges in term of education. Besides this, the infrastructure of the college as well as hostel is also good. Campus facilities are also nice. Faculty and other staff of the campus is very helpful. Campus has its own bus facilities for day scholars. This is one of the best colleges in term of education. overview_faqs.question: Is Vidya Vikas Pratishthan Institute of Engineering and Technology, Solapur a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Vidya Vikas Pratishthan Institute of Engineering and Technology, Solapur is a well-known institution for B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Vidya Vikas Pratishthan Institute of Engineering and Technology, Solapur has a rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.7 on campuslife, 2.3 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: An honest review of VVPIET, Solapur.

content.Placements: The reputation of this college regarding the placements is not so good but they’re trying to improve. It is also the students duty to improve their skillset and give their 100 percent to get placed. The college has given us an assurance that they will provide placements.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility in the college is good and it provides all the necessary facilities for the students. The college also provides a private hostel facility. The course structure is planned according to the AICTE norms and the course completion is also sped up. The college’s location is outside the city.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of VVPIET Solapur.

content.Placements: A very small number of students receive placement offers on college campuses, around 30 to 40 percent. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, while the average package stands at 2.5 LPA for the course. Companies like TCS and Infosys occasionally participate in campus placements. A very small number of students manage to secure internships during their time in college.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good; it has Wi-Fi facilities, well-maintained labs, and a library where we can access the curriculum and competitive exam books. The hostel facility is also good, offering low charges, and the food quality in the mess is good as well.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of VVPIET, Solapur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility in the college is good and it provides all the necessary facilities for the students. The college also provides a private hostel facility. The course structure is planned according to the AICTE norms and the course completion is also sped up. The college’s location is outside the city.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of VVPIET Solapur.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good; it has Wi-Fi facilities, well-maintained labs, and a library where we can access the curriculum and competitive exam books. The hostel facility is also good, offering low charges, and the food quality in the mess is good as well.

reviews.review_heading: Honest Review of VVP Solapur .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good, with classrooms equipped with digital teaching facilities. There is also a well-stocked library. The labs have all the necessary equipment for experiments. The quality of facilities in the hostel is good. The food quality in the mess and canteen is also good. Additionally, sports activities are available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of VVPIET Solapur.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, with Wi-Fi and ethernet available in the labs. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and benches. The library stocks all curriculum and competitive exam books. Hostel facilities are also available and of good quality. The mess and canteen provide good-quality food. The college organizes sports and games at the college level.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with facilities, placements, and teachers of this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. Laboratories are decent. Computers are also available in the laboratory. The library is average. Hostel facilities are great. The food served in the mess is decent. Canteen is also available. Medical facilities are not good. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and other facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, etc., are also good.
reviews.review_text: There are decent good building and facilities. There are good labs, and there are also good hostel facilities. Our college provides Wi-Fi facility, and our college management is ready to help and solve issues all the time. Labs are provided all the time to all students, and there are huge classrooms. This college organises sports day and provides all types of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculties, good curriculum activities and infrastructure
reviews.review_text:
There are many facilities like ro water plant, e library,  reading room, digital classrooms, computer labs , and other course related labs 
Hostel facilities are good but sometimes face problems for hot water. Food available in mess and canteen can be prepared more well. College organises various sports, dance, traditional days and various games

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and all facilities but placement is not as much good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at this level. Wi-Fi is available, digital classrooms are there. Sports and other culture activities are arranged in the campus. Canteen food is good and hostel rooms are also best.

reviews.review_heading: Good but not value of money.
reviews.review_text: Not enough facilities are available in the college, no Wi-Fi is provided, and no new technology is installed. The efficiency is okay, but not reliable for the students. They have smart classrooms that should be for every class, but only one department has one smart classrooms.

highlights.summary: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Praveenya Institute of Marine Engineering admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Praveenya Institute of Marine Engineering offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and Certificate levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the Certificate level, the college offers courses such as Certificate. Praveenya Institute of Marine Engineering courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Praveenya Institute of Marine Engineering courses stands around INR 2,75,000 to 7,85,000.

review_content.Infrastructure: We have 10 acres of the whole college, a ship on the campus, a swimming pool, a workshop, a football ground, a shuttle ground, a volleyball ground, a hostel facility, various laboratories i.e. material testing lab, electronic lab, fluid mechanics lab, automation lab, etc. and a big library with more than 10000 books.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Placements have been a major problem.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not offered by our college but they have been working on this and are expected to bring some companies. By the next academic year, there are no records of the college management providing any placements. Our seniors have passed out and found their own way of finding a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure includes Wi-Fi, fully equipped classrooms and doctors who regularly come to the hostel for any medical problems. Sports equipment are also good. The food is one of the problems of this institute. The mess menu cannot be changed.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not offered by the college. But they have been working on this and are expected to bring some companies by the next year. They also have found a consultant for the current passout batch. Our seniors have passed out and found their own ways of finding a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure including Wi-Fi, fully-equipped classrooms, a doctor who regularly visits the hostel for any medical issues, good sports equipment. Food is one of the strengths of this institute. The mess menu can also be changed every 3 months.
