review_summary.college_name: Praveenya Institute of Marine Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our course teaching and certificates have their own value, but we are only lagging in placements.

content.Placements: The placements are not available in this college right now. But the management is planning to bring required placements to the students. And also planning to introduce STCW course in our college. The salary will be based on the post that which you are qualified. The salary package starts from 15000 to 50000 based on the company that in which you got recruited. The salary for the chief engineer is minimum 5Lakhs and maximum 7 Lakhs.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The campus has many facilities like AC classrooms, a library, sports and games, for entertainment there is a TV room also. The college also provides medical facilities. The hostel facility is also available on the campus. The quality of food is the best. The best thing in the hostel rooms is 2 members per room, for the first year and second year, and 1 member per room for next two years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, facilities and a working ship on the campus for students' training

content.Placements: In 2017, we have 35 members who have completed marine engineering. Almost, 60% persons have got the employment in various shipping companies and before last year, we had 32 students including graduates from marine engineering in that batch. 90% members had got placements in ships. As per DG Shipping Rules, every college will have inspections based on that placements and will have points. The highest salary we got from the company was 800 dollars to the cadets in the 2017 batch and the least salary is 300 dollars.
content.Infrastructure: We have 10 acres of the whole college, a ship on the campus, a swimming pool, a workshop, a football ground, a shuttle ground, a volleyball ground, a hostel facility, various laboratories i.e. material testing lab, electronic lab, fluid mechanics lab, automation lab, etc. and a big library with more than 10000 books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Marine Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Placements have been a major problem.

content.Placements: Placements are not offered by our college but they have been working on this and are expected to bring some companies. By the next academic year, there are no records of the college management providing any placements. Our seniors have passed out and found their own way of finding a job.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure includes Wi-Fi, fully equipped classrooms and doctors who regularly come to the hostel for any medical problems. Sports equipment are also good. The food is one of the problems of this institute. The mess menu cannot be changed.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

overview_faqs.question: Is Bharti Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Bharti Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for BCA, D.Ed, B.Pharma, B.Tech, PGDCA, UG Diploma, B.A.M.S., B.Sc., B.Ed, D.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech. review_summary.college_name: Bharti Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (B. A. M. S.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Sports and extracurricular activities are not held properly here.

content.Placements: About 50-60% of students get placed in the college. The lowest salary offered ranges from Rs. 15,000-25,000 per month, and the highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 90,000 to 1 lac per month. Many companies like BHU, Patanjali, Himalaya, Kama Ayurveda, etc., visit the college for placements. Almost 90-100% of students get an internship in government hospitals. A top role offered is a medical officer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are good, and all classrooms have a projector. The library is good. Girls hostel is average, but boys hostel is not good. The quality of food served in a mess is average. Two canteens are available on campus. Sports facilities are not good in our college, but medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It is a well-developed college campus.

content.Placements: In our course of civil engineering, more than 40% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 4,000 per month. Almost 70% of the students from our batch got an internship from college. Many companies provided internships to our college students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are very good, and they provide Wi-Fi for students for the study purpose. There is a well-developed library with thousands of books. Hostel rooms are a bit small, and in one room, 2-3 students are placed. Canteen and medical facilities are also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the finest colleges in Chhattisgarh.

content.Placements: I don't get any placement in any company though I gave 3 interviews in campus selection. But only for the experience. Most companies visited the campus are a startup company. I received a good amount of experience in giving interviews. And I also gain practical knowledge about working in the Company.
content.Infrastructure: Each block is allotted for different branches of engineering and medical branches. The college is surrounded naturally. It has a separate entrance for faculty and students. Each building has more than 5 floors, and it looks very attractive from far. The college is spread over more than a thousand acres.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bharti College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for computer science and IT departments only. It is moderate for the ENTC department. There are no placements for mechanical and civil departments. So, if you are taking admission in CSE or IT department, you have chances to get placed. Placements are good enough compared to other private colleges of Rajasthan and north region colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is according to the fee that they charge. It is moderate. The college has all the basic facilities that are required in a college. You cannot expect the infrastructure of our college to be like VIT and SRM. They are working hard on improving its infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in few areas on the campus. Its speed is very poor, so you cannot expect much about it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking just for a degree, then join this college.

content.Placements: Companies visit the campus rarely, and hardly anyone gets placed. The placement rate is very low. Students should not expect placements from this college. If you are looking for placements, it's better not to join this college. There is no placement assistance. You should find jobs on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and there are big buildings. Our campus is huge, but there is no playground. There are large buildings, but no facilities are available. The basic facilities are quite good but not extraordinary. There are labs which are barely in working condition.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bharti Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. Sports and extracurricular activities are not held properly here.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are good, and all classrooms have a projector. The library is good. Girls hostel is average, but boys hostel is not good. The quality of food served in a mess is average. Two canteens are available on campus. Sports facilities are not good in our college, but medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-developed college campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are very good, and they provide Wi-Fi for students for the study purpose. There is a well-developed library with thousands of books. Hostel rooms are a bit small, and in one room, 2-3 students are placed. Canteen and medical facilities are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the finest colleges in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: Each block is allotted for different branches of engineering and medical branches. The college is surrounded naturally. It has a separate entrance for faculty and students. Each building has more than 5 floors, and it looks very attractive from far. The college is spread over more than a thousand acres.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bharti College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is according to the fee that they charge. It is moderate. The college has all the basic facilities that are required in a college. You cannot expect the infrastructure of our college to be like VIT and SRM. They are working hard on improving its infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in few areas on  the campus. Its speed is very poor, so you cannot expect much about it.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking just for a degree, then join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and there are big buildings. Our campus is huge, but there is no playground. There are large buildings, but no facilities are available. The basic facilities are quite good but not extraordinary. There are labs which are barely in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome in the college. The library is very big on the campus, and the other curricular activities like sports and games are very great. The classrooms are very neat and clean on the campus. The medical facilities also available in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not good as the students are getting depressed.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are not proper. The Wi-Fi facility is not in proper range, so its network problem occurs in many places. The labs are not clean. The space in the classrooms are proper, but there is no light in classrooms as we open windows for getting light. The medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Te facilities and faculty members both could be better.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and faculty members both are below average. Just advertises as a good one. Still it is okay to survive. Has no Wi-Fi provided in college. As well as hostel. There are nogood network in most rooms, food again is below avg. Doesn't even has breakfast or snacks except for holidays only break fast.

reviews.review_heading: Our college does not provide high placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: The college canteen is very bad, and it is not properly clean. The canteen does not have a seating arrangement. Food served in a mess is not good because it only serves one type of food. Medical facilities are available. There is no space for parking a bike and car.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, best faculty and all facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for this course is good and the facilities are - 24*7 Wi-Fi networks and AC library open all the time. Classrooms and labs are well cleaned with good infrastructure. Hostel facilities and quality of food available in the mess is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome in Bharti group of college. It has it's style of making up the things. There are the wonderful high tech lab and classrooms with CCTV cameras and smart board. The library is the main Thing in the infrastructure. As it is amazing which works 365 days until midnight. The hostel rooms are average and food Is superb. Overall hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review from alumini
reviews.review_text: a well located college. the location is very suitable for studying it is located in the outskirts of the city so that the student can concentrate on studies a very calm and relaxing environment is provided to study the campus has integrated wifi routers classrooms are well maintained too.

faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good in our college, and our college is a branch of JNTUH Hyderabad. Here, all facilities are provided by the college like labs with computers, a library with lots of books and medical facilities, a canteen, and hostels for both girls and boys are available.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college because of the good faculty and the availability of all labs.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classes are good, but we have to make some adjustments. The college has a temporary address, as it is not permanent yet. The infrastructure is being built at another location. Currently, we are in a government degree college, and it is okay to stay here for now.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Rajanna Sircilla.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good at present, as this college is temporarily running at government degree college Agraharam. The infrastructure is good and nice at present, as I recently graduated from this college. The hostel is also available for both boys and girls. It has good facilities like rooms, dinning area, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I was absolutely not happy about the campus, hostel, and college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: A big problem is that there is no campus at all in this college. While other colleges compete for big campuses and a large campus environment for students, this college is in a place where we don't have many amenities, and many students struggle with the hostels as they are very far and tough to go to daily.

college_info.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Rajanna Sircilla

individual_reviews.title: About our education at Newton's College.

content.Placements: In our college, most students are placed in companies like Tata, Tesla, and HCL. Our college offers various courses across all departments, including MBA, MCA, BBA, and B.Com. Internships are provided through programs like Google STEP for second-year students. Roles offered in the college include Java development, which is a complete course for senior students. The highest package in our college is 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Mainly in our college, the infrastructure is very poor. In the ECE branch, there are only a limited number of classrooms. There is no Wi-Fi facility on campus, not even in the library, and the library also lacks air conditioning. In the bookstall, many books are missing. Sports and games facilities are limited, and no tournaments are conducted in the college. The canteen has no fans, and there are very few benches available.

hostel_campus.college_name: Newton's Institute of Engineering (NIE Guntur) Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: About our education at Newton's College.
reviews.review_text: Mainly in our college, the infrastructure is very poor. In the ECE branch, there are only a limited number of classrooms. There is no Wi-Fi facility on campus, not even in the library, and the library also lacks air conditioning. In the bookstall, many books are missing. Sports and games facilities are limited, and no tournaments are conducted in the college. The canteen has no fans, and there are very few benches available.

reviews.review_heading: Whatever it may be, I like the college.
reviews.review_text: Mainly, washrooms are not hygienic on the campus. There is a Wi-Fi problem because it does not provide Wi-Fi for students. In the library, there is no AC and only fans and lights are available. The library infrastructure is too bad in this college. The quality of the food is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Newton's Institute has big roads and buildings.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are benches and tables in a disciplined way. It has an exceptional hall but the same is not provided in some classrooms. There is a hostel in Newton's College but with limited rooms. The canteen is good. Games are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Newton's Institute of Engineering (NIE Guntur).
reviews.review_text: Our college has a normal infrastructure but the place is so good. Mainly, the transportation is so good in the college for the local students. There are no study hours like other colleges. The mess in the college hostel has few items with tasteless food.

reviews.review_heading: Newton's is good in the studies and also skilled teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are comfortable but the fans and lights are old. The washrooms are not clean in this college. The net problem is there in this college. Also, the quality of the food is somewhat bad. But there is no chance to eat outside. There are no hotels. Restaurants are there in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Newton's is the oldest college with all the benefits of the placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the college will be so much of the cleanness. The efforts of the infrastructure. There are no problems with Wi-Fi settings per head. They will be allotted 1.5 GB per head on a roll number-wise. The facilities and the hostel food are not bad but good premium in the quality. Also, the library is now only constructed nicely.

reviews.review_heading: About our Newtons College in Guntur, with a lot of freedom.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in Newtons College are not very good. Most of courses offered are CSE, CSM, and CSD. I like the CSM course because placements are very good. However, there are many problems with washrooms and Wi-Fi  facility in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in terms of students' perspective.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is somewhat good. Library and digital library are available in our college. We can download journals and text books in digital library. Hostel rooms for boys are a little bit ugly. Mess and canteen food is available at hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with decent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge. It has good infrastructure, although it has a lot of drawbacks. There is no Wi-Fi, but labs are well maintained and the classrooms are well-ventilated. The library is also good for those who want to gain knowledge. They can go to the library and study well or prepare for competitive exams.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with our hostel food. I had good placements in 2021 and really good faculty member
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and libraries are available. The quality of food is poor, but a canteen facility is available. The quantity of medical facilities is good. There is a games facility, so overall, college is good .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We had a wide and large playground and an indoor stadium and a hall. Our college provides us with great opportunities of getting into games. Library is one of the good things we have. Hostel quality is very good and the food served is also very good. The surroundings of the college are also very peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Quality education with low cost.
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms are very gd, and Wi-Fi is always available to students, Library is always give new updated books to students for their academic syllabus and Computer labs also very neat, Sports facilities also very Gd
And the Mess is also awesome and food is A1.

reviews.review_heading: In my academic year, a lot of students got placed in the campus placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facilities are good. The mechanical, computer and civil labs are maintained very well. Classrooms are also very good. I enjoyed my studies during my tenure. The college conducts all sports and games competitions.

reviews.review_heading: NIE is good for poor and education needy people.
reviews.review_text: Good computer and mechanical labs are available. We have the best library with more than 100 books and digital library. Sports room consist of a lot of infrastructure bats and balls, and for girls, tennikoit and throw ball. The college buses are available at Macherla on time and separate for girls and boys.

The campus is located near Nagarjuna Sagar near to Macherla town in Guntur district and is affialiated to JNTU Kakinada University.
The college has a healthy environment. It has well qualified and student friendly faculty members.
College is wi-fi enabled and has a decent infrastructure.
The campus canteen was large enough to serve 300 students at one time. The campus is located near Nagarjuna Sagar near to Macherla town in Guntur district and is affialiated to JNTU Kakinada University.

college_info.college_name: School of Bio Technology, IFTM University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Established in 2003, School of Bio Technology, IFTM University is located in Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, B.Sc. and M.Sc. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 8 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Science. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: School of Bio Technology, IFTM University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Science. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Sc. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and M.Sc. School of Bio Technology, IFTM University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for School of Bio Technology, IFTM University courses stands around INR 90,000 to 3,68,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Food Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Make it your last option.

review_content.Placements: If you're getting admission in IFTM University then first of all make it your last option or no option (that's better) at all. You should really forget about the campus placements. Teachers will help you a lot and that's the only good part about it.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library is good but the classrooms are too much to handle. I mean they're very bad. You cannot feel like you're sitting in a good classroom with that ceiling, paint and lighting. They look like a store room of my house.
review_content.Faculty: The only good part is the faculty. They are really helpful if you ask them for any help or advice. I got good teachers in my course and yes, they make us ready to enter the new world. The semester exams are difficult. You've to study in order to achieve good marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) with Research in Microbiology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of School of Bio Technology, IFTM University.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not good in our college. Only a few students got placed in our college. Many companies visit our college for placements to recruit students. There are many placement offers for biotechnology and other department students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides facilities like a garden, a well-maintained library, and clean classrooms. The Wi-Fi system is not good. The hostel is good. The sports department is much better.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) with Research in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Thank you for giving me this opportunity.

content.Placements: The students only get placement after M.Sc. There is no option for a B.Sc. student's placement. The maximum package of an M.Sc. student would be 10-12 LPA. B.Tech students get placement after the course. Most companies like Bisleri, whirlpool, Amazon, Flipkart etc come for the placement.
content.Infrastructure: Free Transport provided by the campus, for faculty and students. Wi-Fi is available in every department. The library is available with various books of courses and competitive exams. The college canteen is available. The food is awesome. Hostel mess is available, dispensary is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) with Research in Biotechnology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty but not satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: Placements provided in our college are not good so students have to find placements and internships off-campus. Best and deserving students get placed in reputed companies with good salary packages. Our college does not provide internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are large and spacious but projectors are not available. Labs are not up to date and lack many instruments and apparatus. Library lacks in books. Hostel facility is good and affordable. Food served in the mess is tasty. Wi-Fi is provided in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) with Research in Microbiology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 99.99% of students from our course get placed. The highest salary offered in our course is Rs. 50,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. The average salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000-35,000 per month. Companies like Amul, Parle, Britannica, pharmaceutical companies, microbiology labs, etc., visit the college for placements. Only the toppers get the internship from the above-mentioned companies. Roles like microbiologist, lab manager, QA and QC, lab technician, food specialist, nutrition expert, etc., are offered here.

reviews.review_text: E erything is included, including Wi-Fi, which is free. The classrooms have projectors for better understanding, and there is a library with all the required books. Good quality of food, a good bed, a program, 2 almiras, and 2 study tables. Good medical facilities and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college though.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by this college are very good. Wi-Fi, Labs, Classrooms, and Library all are very satisfying and really very good. The canteen food is also good and sports facilities are also provided over here. Medical facilities are also provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is the best as you enjoy every moment.
reviews.review_text: There is no proper instrumentation for the lab, although the classes are good. The best part of this college is the library; I have personally visited it many times and found all the books I needed available on campus. However, the food in the canteen is not good, as there are limited varieties, while the food in the hostels, like the mess, is better.

college_info.intro:
Bosscoder School of Technology offers a BTech programme to students as its flagship course. It is offered for a duration of 4 years in collaboration with S-VYASA University, Bangalore. It is a fully-residential programme and is designed to build strong knowledge in computer science along with advanced AI skills.
The college also focuses on providing theoretical as well as practical knowledge to students. BST Bangalore BTech programme is accredited by NAAC and is approved by the AICTE. This programme is also rated by K-Sure which makes this degree reliable across the world. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Bosscoder School of Technology in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Bosscoder School of Technology placement 2025 details are not out yet. It will be updated once it is released. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated placement team. It guarantees 100% placement assistance to students in top companies.

Some of the top recruiters at BST Bangalore are Google, Microsoft, Samsung, Amazon, Uber, Zomato, Zepto, Swiggy, and Ola. Further, the college provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:

The BTech programme offered at BST Bangalore has a realistic curriculum and provides practical learning to students. It also provides 1-year (final-year) industry immersion to make sure students have the knowledge in all the fields, namely technology, business, and innovation landscape. college_info.intro:
Rungta College, Bhilai of Engineering is a popular choice for students admitting into the Rungta Group of Institutions. The Rungta College, Bhilai of Engineering offers courses in B.Tech with specializations in streams like Civil Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Data Science, Cyber Security, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Telecommunication, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Mining Engineering.
Also popular among Rungta College, Bhilai undergraduate courses are Pharmacy programs like B.Pharmacy. Commerce offerings include B.Com – Computer Applications and BBA. For those looking to pursue academic or philanthropic careers, the Rungta Group of Institutions provides courses like B.Ed and Master of Social Work (MSW). Additionally, many postgraduate and diploma programs like M.Tech and M.Pharma and D.Ed are also preferred by students.
More information regarding the popular programmes at Rungta Group of Institutions may be found below:

review_summary.college_name: Rungta College, Bhilai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I love my college life, and I also miss my college days.

content.Placements: I got placed in various reputable companies, which are TCS, MRF Limited, Autosense and toit, and I also raised the training and placement cell of our college, which helps us in cracking interviews. The average package was 4.5 LPA, and the highest was 9 LPA. Top recruits are Axis Bank, Deloitte, Google, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Nice and well-equipped classrooms filled with smart features, Wi-Fi labs and a central library. The campus has its own mess for hostelers. Students can play various games.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are very loving and helpful. This course gives us knowledge about management, which makes students industry-ready. Exams have been conducted in the semester. Every semester has 4 subjects, and the pass percentage is 60 to 70%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Rungta College of Science and Technology is the best place to pursue your career.

content.Placements: It's not about the percentage number of students please in our college it's about who is capable of getting placement. You should be capable of creating in top MNC companies like Amazon, Google, and Walmart. Almost every student got an internship at our college. Roles like HR manager, sales manager, salesperson, and finance manager are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel has almost every facility like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, and other food facilities for the students who stay there. The quality of life in our house cell. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is up to the point and facilities like sports and games are available for the students for their extra activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The kind of community you want to be part of.

content.Placements: The pass percentage of our department students is more than 80% but any single student is not placed through campus selection. But sometimes a few companies recruit a few students at low salary packages for short working periods. Top companies like Amazon, Tata, BSP, etc., visit our college for placements. But the same job offers are offered to students like call center jobs and not any other types of job.
content.Infrastructure: In the mess and hostel, all the items are good except the quality of food they give. Food is not good in taste and is cooked in an improper manner.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Information about GD Rungta College of Science and Technology, Bhilai.

content.Placements: Campus placement drives are conducted every year. The placement rate at the engineering department is much higher than in other departments. Overall departments have a good placement rate but engeenering department offers the most. The average salary package ranges from 5 LPA-10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average. The college has various sports sections such as badminton, football, cricket, basketball, and volleyball. The hostel services provide food, cleaning, and laundry services. Overall everything is properly arranged and provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College environment is nice. Overall, the college is nice.

content.Placements: Around 45% of students were got placements. The highest package was 12 lakh per annum, the average package was 2–3 lakh per annum and the lowest package was 1 lakh per annum. There was a banking company I don't remember; I guess it was Axis Bank. In our college, a smaller number of students get placed. The top role was full-stack development.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were good but not well maintained. The major problems were that the bathrooms were not maintained and were dirty all the time. I don't think that there are any other problems regarding classes, lab, Wi-Fi, or the library. But one thing is for sure: the software and courses are a bit old, according to today's generation. The hostel's infrastructure was okay but there was a rule that 5 people should live in one room and there was only 1 bathroom for 5 people. Food was the worst. Sports were nicely organized.

paragraphs: Rungta College, Bhilai offers quality higher education in a wide variety of subjects like Pharmacy, Engineering, Education, Social Work, Commerce etc. The courses vary across subject and specialisation line, and students are encouraged to check the fees page of Rungta College.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does JMS Group of Institutions offer to students?

faqs.answer: JMS Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.B.Sc.candidate must have passed intermediate examination of U.P. Board or 10+2 level examination or its equivalent from any recognised Board/ University with Physics, Chemistry, Maths as subjects.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognised board/Institute. The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed minimum three years Bachelor degree course with the mentioned marks in aggregate without any grace marks from a recognised Institute/ University.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognised board/Institute. The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.BBACandidate must have passed intermediate examination of U.P. Board or 10+2 level examination or its equivalent from any recognised Board/ University.BCACandidates who have passed 12th with the mentioned marks in aggregate and with the Mathematics subject as one of the subjects either in 10th or 12th from a recognised board are eligible.B.A.candidate must have passed intermediate examination of U.P. Board or 10+2 level examination or its equivalent from any recognised Board/ University.B.Comcandidate must have passed intermediate examination of U.P. Board or 10+2 level examination or its equivalent from any recognised Board/ University.

faqs.question: How can I get into JMS Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
JMS Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.B.Sc.candidate must have passed intermediate examination of U.P. Board or 10+2 level examination or its equivalent from any recognised Board/ University with Physics, Chemistry, Maths as subjects.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognised board/Institute.
The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed minimum three years Bachelor degree course with the mentioned marks in aggregate without any grace marks from a recognised Institute/ University.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognised board/Institute.
The minimum age is 14 years as on 1st July 2022, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009

faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at JMS Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by JMS Group of Institutions is up to 770. Good thing to know is that JMS Group of Institutions has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have good library and computer lab. College facilities are also good. Good washrooms for both students and good labs. There is free Wi-Fi for students. The smart class is also provided and every lab has an AC.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided by the college are good. Our college provides a bus for students. The hostel is well-maintained at a reasonable price. The food served in the canteen and mess is tasty and hygienic. The medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is glorious, full of joy, and the teachers are helpful.
reviews.review_text: In this college, students just go for studies. There are maintained classrooms and well-designed laboratories. It has good speed internet and Wi-Fi. There is a library full of silence and many books are provided. The quality of food is good in the canteen and the food is fresh.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, and the faculty are also good.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, proper labs, proper classrooms, a library and separate blocks for different departments. Technical courses, manage my courses, medical courses, etc., are offered. Sports and games are available. Indoor games and outdoor games are limited.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best way for best future.
reviews.review_text: JMS Group of Institutions is spread over a sprawling 16-acre campus, based in an eco- friendly environment and amidst the beauty and quiet nature. It has excellent indoor and outdoor sports facilities, spacious classrooms, a family atmosphere, and a ragging-free campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for best education.
reviews.review_text: This college is spread over a sprawling 16-acre campus, based in an eco-friendly environment, and amidst the beauty of nature. It has excellent indoor and outdoor sports facilities, spacious classrooms, fully air conditioner classrooms, and a fully Wi-Fi is available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best institute in Hapur.
reviews.review_text: This college is spread over a sprawling 16-acre campus-based in an eco-friendly environment and amidst the beauty. It has excellent indoor and outdoor sports facilities, spacious classrooms, a family atmosphere, and ragging free campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JMS Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: This college is spread over a sprawling 16-acre campus, based in an eco-friendly environment, and amidst the beauty of nature. It has excellent indoor and outdoor sports facilities, spacious classrooms, a family atmosphere, and ragging free campus.

reviews.review_heading: JMS is the best college for our studies.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and is accessible for all students. There are good labs. Medical facilities are available for students. The hostel is good. A good playground is available here. A good canteen is available here. The classrooms are very good.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for the best education.
reviews.review_text: JMS group has a very beautiful structure, and a very environment-friendly campus. It also provides the best facilities to students like a library and other spaces for studies. They provide a fully Wi-Fi campus and air-conditioned classroom with project classes.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best institute for education.
reviews.review_text: It has the best institute in Hapur with beautiful infrastructure and the best facilities. It provides highly qualified faculty members with modern teaching skills. The best environment to study and make students' life good. The best thing is the location of JMS it is covered with the beauty of nature, and fresh air near NH-9.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the infrastructure, faculty. The worst, almost zero placement record.
reviews.review_text: The campus is poor. There is no Wi-Fi given to students at all. The classrooms are not much good. There is no air conditioning at all. Medical facilities are okay. There are no labs at all. The hostel is far away from the college campus. The hostel is the worst quality campus. The food there is very bad, and the rooms are also not good. There is no canteen in the college campus. If any canteen gets opened, it lasts for only 1-1.5 months maximum. No playground/courts are in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at JMS Group of Institute is well designed and it is also located in a great location. The environment is also good. The college has provided you with all the facilities needed. But the only problem is that it doesn't have hostel facility for students.

reviews.review_heading: The placement record is very good.
reviews.review_text: It's a good college with a great location and with good facilities. Our institute has a fully WiFi-equipped campus and the infrastructure is also really good. Here, we are provided with really good classrooms and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for students on campus, even the phone network doesn't work properly. Labs have outdated systems. None of them work properly some have mouse issues, some have keyboard issues, and some systems are even not capable of running the code. Library is only for the course they don't book other books than 5-6 course books related to courses. For that, you have to pay Rs 1500 (which they say it is refundable but creates problems at the time of refund). No hostel facility is provided by ...
